overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on a futuristic elevated metro train in Cyberpunk 2077's Night City. The clip alternates between views of the train interior with passengers and a cyberpunk musician, and sweeping views of the dense urban cityscape with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements passing by the window.

standing passenger couple looking at phone and conversing near the door

upholstered green seating along the train wall
digital display showing train route and station information
large rectangular window showing passing city outside

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a futuristic metro train car with green upholstered seating and orange handrails. A distinctive character with a red mohawk plays a stringed instrument while other passengers stand near the doors. Overhead holographic displays show route information as the train moves through the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train track passing through dense cyberpunk commercial district

events.description: camera pans right from interior to look out the train window at the passing cityscape

agents.ego_description: looking out the train window at the towering cyberpunk buildings and holographic advertisements

entered.detail: tall futuristic building with glass facade and multiple billboard screens
large purple digital advertisement displaying anime-style characters
teal-colored building with horizontal wooden or metal slat design
massive cyan-tinted holographic projection of a woman's face on building side

segments.scene_description: The view transitions to the exterior cityscape visible through the train window, revealing a dense cyberpunk metropolis with towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements. The train moves along elevated tracks past buildings with distinctive architectural styles including teal slatted facades and massive digital billboards displaying anime characters. Bright midday sunlight illuminates the futuristic urban landscape.

events.description: camera pans back from the window to show other passengers inside the train car

agents.ego_description: looking around the train interior at other seated passengers while the train continues moving

notable_agents.action: seated passenger wearing bright pink cap and yellow shirt looking at phone
standing passenger in blue shirt looking out the window

entered.detail: yellow upholstered passenger seats on the right side of the train
glass and metal train door with teal frame

segments.scene_description: The camera pans back inside the train car, revealing passengers seated on yellow upholstered seats. A passenger in a pink cap is visible in the foreground looking at their phone, while others stand near the doors. The train continues its journey through the city as the view shifts away from the exterior landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: train interior near musician with view of passing city through window

agents.ego_description: watching the musician play while occasionally glancing at the passing cityscape through the window behind them

notable_agents.action: musician with red mohawk continuing to play stringed instrument

entered.detail: digital screen showing metro line map and station stops

segments.scene_description: The view returns to the original area with the musician, who continues playing their instrument. The metro route display is visible overhead showing the train's progress. Through the window behind the musician, the passing cityscape and bright sunlight are visible as the train completes its journey through the downtown district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that alternates between the interior of a futuristic metro train and the sprawling cyberpunk metropolis passing outside. It begins inside the car among green upholstered seating and orange handrails, where a musician with a red mohawk plays a stringed instrument beneath holographic route displays. As the camera shifts toward the window, the view opens into a dense urban landscape of towering skyscrapers, teal slatted facades, and massive digital billboards illuminated by bright midday sunlight. The scene then pans back into the cabin to reveal passengers in yellow seats, including a person in a pink cap focused on a phone, before turning back toward the musician. Finally, the camera settles on the performer and the overhead displays while the sunlit downtown district continues to streak past in the background.
